_comment: Slack manifest for the Watcher (framework watchdog daemon). Workspace-scoped Socket Mode bot with interactivity + the /watcher slash command. Substitute {{WATCHER_NAME}} (default 'Watcher'). Creates a write-only-ish bot — chat:write/im:write/users:read/commands. Used by the setup-watcher skill via apps.manifest.create.

display_information.name: {{WATCHER_NAME}}
display_information.description: ginnie-agents framework watchdog — alerts on issues, accepts ops actions
